articles.excerpt: Passive models for long video understanding typically rely on a "watch-it-all" paradigm, processing frames uniformly regardless of query difficulty, causing computational cost to grow with video duration. Although interactive frameworks have emerged, they often rely on global pre-scanning, and their context cost still scales with video length. We propose OmniAgent, the first native omni-modal agen
articles.summary: OmniAgent 提出原生全模态主动感知框架，摒弃“全看一遍”被动模式，根据查询难度动态处理帧，显著降低长视频理解的计算成本，实现推理驱动的高效感知。

articles.title: Learning User Simulators with Turing Rewards
articles.excerpt: Learning to simulate human users in interactive settings could advance the training of agent assistants, evaluation of personalization systems, research in the social sciences, and more. Existing approaches generally do so by training a large language model (LLM) to match a single ground truth response, either by maximizing the log probability or by using a similarity reward. We instead propose {T
articles.summary: 提出图灵奖励（Turing Rewards）训练用户模拟器，替代传统单一真值匹配方法，让LLM以交互式对抗学习生成更真实的人类行为，提升智能体训练与个性化系统评估效果。

articles.title: STARE: Surprisal-Guided Token-Level Advantage Reweighting for Policy Entropy Stability
articles.excerpt: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards algorithms like GRPO have emerged as the dominant post-training paradigm for complex reasoning in LLMs, yet commonly suffer from policy entropy collapse during training. We conduct a first-order gradient analysis of token-level entropy dynamics under GRPO and identify a token-level credit assignment mismatch: the per-token entropy variation decomposes
articles.summary: STARE 方法针对 GRPO 训练中策略熵崩溃问题，通过 surprise 引导的 token 级别优势重加权，修正信用分配不匹配，稳定 LLM 推理强化学习的熵动态。

articles.title: EfficientRollout: System-Aware Self-Speculative Decoding for RL Rollouts
articles.excerpt: Reinforcement learning (RL) has become a representative post-training paradigm for LLMs, enabling strong reasoning and agentic capabilities. However, rollout generation remains a dominant latency bottleneck because autoregressive sampling decodes responses sequentially and a small number of long-tailed generations often determine completion time. Speculative decoding (SD) offers a natural way to a
articles.summary: EfficientRollout 提出系统感知的自推测解码，用于加速 RL 训练中的 rollout 生成。利用推测解码并行预测，缓解长尾序列造成的延迟瓶颈，提升 LLM 后训练效率。

articles.title: Physics-IQ Verified
articles.excerpt: Video generative models ( VGMs) have become a new frontier that can be used not just for video generation but for a multitude of downstream tasks, including world modeling. To advance these tasks, a good video model must understand the physical reality of the world. Evaluating this understanding is an emerging field and has led to the Physics-IQ benchmark, which quantifies this explicitly by compa
articles.summary: Physics-IQ 基准显式评估视频生成模型对物理现实的理解能力。该研究验证了模型在物理规律遵从性上的表现，推动世界模型向更真实的物理模拟发展。

articles.title: REVES: REvision and VErification--Augmented Training for Test-Time Scaling
articles.excerpt: Test-time scaling via sequential revision has emerged as a powerful paradigm for enhancing Large Language Model (LLM) reasoning. However, standard post-training methods primarily optimize single-shot objectives, creating a fundamental misalignment with multi-step inference dynamics. While recent work treats this as multi-turn reinforcement learning (RL), conventional approaches optimize over the m
articles.summary: REVES 引入修订-验证增强训练，解决后训练优化与多步推理之间的错配。通过多轮 RL 方法提升 LLM 在测试时通过顺序修订进行推理缩放的效果。

articles.title: PAIWorld: A 3D-Consistent World Foundation Model for Robotic Manipulation
articles.excerpt: World foundation models (WFMs) are powerful simulators, yet they predominantly operate in a single-view setting and lack the multi-view 3D consistency required for robotic manipulation. While robotic systems rely on multiple cameras (egocentric, eye-to-hand, and wrist-mounted) for policy learning, current multi-view world models simply concatenate view tokens without explicit geometric reasoning.
articles.summary: PAIWorld 提出首个面向机器人操作的多视图三维一致世界基础模型，显式建模几何关系，将多摄像头输入（自我、眼手、腕装）整合为统一的三维场景表示。

articles.title: Unified Multimodal Autoregressive Modeling with Shared Context-Visual Tokenizer is Key to Unification
articles.excerpt: Unified Multimodal Modeling aims to integrate visual understanding and generation within a single system. However, existing approaches typically rely on two disparate visual tokenizers, which splits the representation space and hinders truly unified modeling. We propose UniAR, a unified autoregressive framework where a single discrete visual tokenizer serves as the key bridge between understanding
articles.summary: UniAR 提出统一自回归框架，用单一离散视觉 tokenizer 同时处理视觉理解与生成，消除双重 tokenizer 造成的表示空间分裂，实现真正的多模态统一建模。

articles.title: Zone of Proximal Policy Optimization: Teacher in Prompts, Not Gradients
articles.excerpt: Knowledge distillation transfers a teacher's competence to a small student but is brittle in the small-student regime: forcing the student to imitate logits from a much larger teacher concentrates it on the teacher's sharpest modes, hurting generalization on benchmark families beyond the training corpus. Reinforcement learning (RL) avoids logit imitation by training on the student's own rollouts.
articles.summary: ZPPO 提出教师仅通过提示而非梯度指导学生，避免小模型因模仿大模型 logits 导致的泛化退化。利用 RL 在学生自身 rollout 上训练，提升小模型在多种基准上的表现。

articles.title: Looped World Models
articles.excerpt: Current world models face a fundamental tension: faithful long-horizon simulation demands deep computation, but deeper models are expensive to deploy and prone to compounding errors. We resolve this by introducing Looped World Models (LoopWM), which are the first looped architectures for world modelling. Our method iteratively refines latent environment states through a parameter-shared transforme
articles.summary: LoopWM 首次引入循环架构用于世界建模，通过参数共享的 Transformer 迭代细化隐状态，在保持长程仿真质量的同时避免深度模型带来的部署成本与误差累积。

articles.title: EgoCS-400K: An Egocentric Gameplay Dataset for World Models
articles.excerpt: The shift from video generation to interactive world modeling places new demands on data: beyond captioned videos, world models require temporally aligned video-action-language trajectories grounded in the actions, camera motion, states, and events that drive future scene changes. However, such data is difficult to obtain at scale. Web video datasets offer broad visual coverage but lack executable
articles.summary: EgoCS-400K 提供大规模第一人称游戏数据集，包含时间对齐的视频-动作-语言轨迹，为交互式世界模型提供可执行动作的物理仿真训练数据，弥补网络视频缺乏动作标注的不足。

articles.title: LoopCoder-v2: Only Loop Once for Efficient Test-Time Computation Scaling
articles.excerpt: Looped Transformers scale latent computation by repeatedly applying shared blocks, but sequential looping increases latency and KV-cache memory with the loop count. Parallel loop Transformers (PLT) alleviate this cost through cross-loop position offsets (CLP) and shared-KV gated sliding-window attention, making loop count a practical design choice. We therefore study PLT loop-count selection throu
articles.summary: LoopCoder-v2 研究并行循环 Transformer（PLT）的循环次数选择，通过跨循环位置偏移和共享KV门控滑动注意力，实现仅需一次循环即可高效缩放测试时推理，降低延迟和KV缓存。

articles.title: MaineCoon: Pursuing A Real-Time Audio-Visual Social World Model
articles.excerpt: As an increasing majority of global video content is consumed on social platforms for interactive social purposes, video generation models built for social worlds are important but largely overlooked by previous studies. In this work, we define the position of social world models and build a prototype model as the first step towards this goal. While previous world models successfully simulate phys
articles.summary: MaineCoon 定义社交世界模型的概念，构建首个实时视听原型，模拟社交平台上的交互场景，补充以往物理世界模型对社交互动模拟的缺失。

articles.title: ActWorld: From Explorable to Interactive World Model via Action-Aware Memory
articles.excerpt: Interactive world models aim to simulate environment dynamics under real-time user actions. However, their action vocabulary is largely confined to navigation: most actions correspond to motion (e.g., walk, turn, look around), while interaction with objects in the scene (e.g., pick up plates, open doors, or trigger physical responses) is either absent, restricted to game domains, or relegated to p
articles.summary: ActWorld 扩展交互世界模型的动作词汇，除导航移动外支持物体交互（如开门、拾取），通过动作感知记忆实现用户实时操控下的环境动态模拟。

articles.title: From Trainee to Trainer: LLM-Designed Training Environment for RL with Multi-Agent Reasoning
